_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: Nf1 P1 mutants were significantly more susceptible to starvation than controls, succumbing in less than half the time of control flies when housed on a nutrient-free agar media
details: Significantly more susceptible to starvation, succumbing in less than half the time of controls (p < 0.001, Mantel-Cox test, n = 78-80)
